videos.headline: Lewis with the ridiculous one-handed interception
videos.description: Michigan seals a strong defensive win when Jourdan Lewis makes an incredible, diving one-handed interception, one of the best plays of the season.

videos.headline: Wolverines whip out crazy offensive formation
videos.description: Michigan starts a 2nd and 2 play from the 6-yard line with 10 players lined up one-by-one before breaking into normal formation prior to the snap.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wolverines whip out crazy offensive formation) 2016/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Harbaugh enraged after false start call goes against Michigan
videos.description: Jim Harbaugh expresses his displeasure with the officials after a false start call goes against Michigan.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Harbaugh enraged after false start call goes against Michigan) 2016/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michigan's Kenny Allen misses two first-half field goals
videos.description: Michigan kicker Kenny Allen misses field goals from 31 and 43 yards in the first half against Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Michigan's Kenny Allen misses two first-half field goals) 2016/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: A. Hornibrook pass intercepted,C. Stribling return  for 3 yds
videos.description: Alex Hornibrook pass intercepted Channing Stribling return for 3 yds to the Wisc 44

videos.headline: Roughing the snapper call goes against Wisconsin
videos.description: During a Michigan punt, Wisconsin is called for a roughing the snapper penalty resulting in a Wolverines first down.

videos.headline: Speight INT gives Badgers momentum
videos.description: Michigan QB Wilton Speight is intercepted by Wisconsin DB Derrick Tindal who returns it to the Wolverines 31-yard line.

videos.headline: Badgers tie it up on 17-yard TD
videos.description: Wisconsin QB Alex Hornibrook connects with Dare Ogunbowale on a 17-yard touchdown to tie Michigan at 7.

videos.headline: New kicker, same result for Michigan
videos.description: Michigan replaces kicker Kenny Allen with Ryan Tice who misses from 40 yards for the Wolverines third missed field goal of the game.

videos.headline: T.J. Watt shows sacks run in the family
videos.description: T.J. Watt adds another sack to his season tally by taking down Michigan quarterback Wilton Speight to end the third quarter with the score tied 7-7.

videos.headline: Big play puts Michigan in front with Darboh's 46-yard TD
videos.description: With Michigan's offense sputtering all day, the Wolverines finally strike with a 46-yard touchdown pass to Amara Darboh to take the 14-7 lead in the fourth quarter.
